# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: service-a
  labels:
    app: service-a
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-a
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: service-a
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: service-a-container
        image: service-a-image:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080

---

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: service-b
  labels:
    app: service-b
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-b
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: service-b
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: service-b-container
        image: service-b-image:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080

---

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: service-c
  labels:
    app: service-c
spec:
  replicas: 4
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-c
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: service-c
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: service-c-container
        image: service-c-image:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
